news.headline: Man Forced Boy, 3, Into Crocodile Pen at English Zoo, Police Say
news.summary: A man is being held on suspicion of attempted murder after a boy was critically injured when he ended up in a crocodile enclosure at a zoo outside Cambridge, the authorities said.

news.headline: Mamdani gives New York Knicks keys to city after NBA title
news.summary: The New York Knicks celebrated their first NBA title in 53 years with a frenzied ticker-tape parade through Manhattan.

news.headline: Canada - Qatar: Relive Les Rouges' first World Cup win in dominant display
news.summary: Canada produced a dominant display to dismantle Qatar 6-0 in their Group B match on Thursday, taking full control after a chaotic second half in which the visitors collapsed both structurally and numerically. Follow the key moments from the match below.
